about.intro: This page was created by the Codama team. We are a software agency that builds digital products and helps businesses grow. We work with startups and established companies to deliver web and mobile apps, automation, and data solutions. Below you can learn more about what we do and how we work.

hero.title: We bring your digital vision to life. Smart, scalable, and ready to launch.
hero.subtitle: We work with you to build custom solutions that help your business grow. It's more than code; it's a real partnership.

webApps.title: Web Applications
webApps.description: We build custom web applications that are fast, reliable, and user-friendly. Our team utilizes modern tools to ensure your app functions optimally on all devices, runs smoothly, and is designed to scale with your business.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: We design and develop mobile apps that match your business goals. Whether it's for iOS, Android, or both, we focus on user experience, performance, and long-term flexibility so your product feels right from day one.

automation.title: Automation & AI Integration
automation.description: We help you save time and work smarter by adding AI tools and automation to your business. From simple task automation to complete AI workflows, we make your systems faster, easier, and more efficient.

dataBi.title: Data & BI Solutions
dataBi.description: We turn your business data into clear insights you can act on. From building dashboards to setting up database connections, we help you make smart decisions with tools like Power BI, Looker Studio, and Google Sheets.

businessWebsites.title: Business Websites
businessWebsites.description: We create modern, easy-to-manage WordPress websites that look great and work well on any device. Whether it's a landing page or a whole site, we build with SEO and usability in mind so your business makes the right first impression.

whyChoose.title: Why choose Codama
whyChoose.quote: You know your business best. That's why we start by listening, then we dig into your industry to fully understand your audience and goals.
